<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Prometheus scrape endpoint"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/actuator/prometheus"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Exposes all Micrometer metrics in Prometheus text exposition format.
Configure your Prometheus `scrape_configs` to scrape this endpoint.

  parameters={undefined}
>
